args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%streethype%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%streethype%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%';

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue_usd FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 13758, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue_usd FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 13758, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue_usd DESC;
